channel.title: Nick Needham — Blog
channel.description: Notes, build logs, and development work by Nick Needham.

item.title: Gameboy Advance SP Reshell
item.description: Little side project I did for my wife. I gave her my beat up GBA SP, and replaced it with a shell kit I found on good ol' Aliexpress

item.title: My upcoming projects
item.description: Current projects I am working on

item.title: First project/blog post
item.description: Well, first blog post. Im currently working on restoring my 1993~ SNES or (Super Nintendo Entertainment System) for the non-gamers. but first, the funniest s…
